description: Corpus's first 3-card designer-coordinated cycle hitting all three thesis-verbs simultaneously. Battle for Zendikar (2015) is canonically a set built around the Zendikar-vs-Eldrazi cosmological-scale extraction war: the Eldrazi drones consume the plane's mana (LABOR / apparatus-of-extraction), the Zendikari Ally resistance organizes refusal (REBELLION / Allies-as-unified-resistance reframe per MTG Wiki BFZ page), and the white-magic stewards offer care-without-taking ('I can give you strength, but you'll have to bring your own courage' flavor; lifelink-pump oracle text). All three cards are commons in the same set, designer-coordinated by Wizards' BFZ creative team as the three thematic positions of the resistance arc. Bundle-copy potential: 'Battle for Zendikar in three cards: the apparatus consumes, the resistance refuses, the steward holds the ground.' Topology: triangle — each card has a `## Connections` bullet pointing at both other endpoints, completing the 3-edge mutual mirror.
citations: [MTG Wiki: Battle for Zendikar — Eldrazi-invasion as cosmological-scale extraction, Zendikar as extraction-victim]
[MTG Wiki: Sea Gate — Zendikar's most organized resistance fell to the Eldrazi]
[MTG Wiki: BFZ — Allies-as-unified-resistance reframe from Zendikar-block's adventuring-party concept]
[Scryfall: oracle_text + flavor_text on Serene Steward — care-without-coercion register]
[[_triple-thesis]] — foundational meta-hub for the three-verb triangle architecture
other_candidates_considered: Vile Aggregate (BFZ-137) as alternative LABOR anchor — has Ingest mechanic (canonical extraction-of-cards) but is vision-only without trivia; Kozilek's Sentinel preferred for its trivia-confirmed 'extraction at cosmological scale' citation.

Ondu Champion (BFZ-149) as alternative REBELLION anchor — minotaur Ally with Rally granting trample, Gideon-flavor on resistance-rallying; deferred to Reckless Cohort for the Sea Gate grief-driven solo-survivor framing which carries the rebellion-verb at the individual-refusal scale rather than the army-rallying scale (army-rallying is shared with the unified-resistance reframe but Reckless Cohort's 'You go to yours, and I'll go to mine' encodes the individual-refusal moment that the triangle needs as its rebellion-vertex). Ondu Champion is a viable adjacent-edge future commission.

Retreat to Emeria (BFZ-44) as alternative STEWARDSHIP anchor — encodes refuge/sanctuary register but vision-only without trivia; Serene Steward preferred for the trivia-pass-equivalent flavor + oracle text explicitly encoding care-without-coercion as a designer-coordinated white-magic stewardship register.

DBS xenoverse-villains 3-card internal trio (Demigra-Towa-Mira) audited and rejected: all three are antagonist-register (corrupted operators of the Time Breaker apparatus); the cohort body cites no rebellion or stewardship verbs, only apparatus-of-extraction-via-mind-control labor-register. Single-attribution by canonical evidence.
DBS dark-vassal-trio audited and rejected per prompt's anticipation: Tambourine/Cymbal/Drum all carry labor-disposable-worker register only; no rebellion or stewardship in the body.
notes: Triangle topology is rare and structurally satisfying. This is the corpus's first explicit 3-card triple-thesis cycle anchored on canonical-evidence per the [[_triple-thesis]] meta-hub's compression-point discipline. Future BFZ Discrete Lair (if commissioned) inherits the triangle as its narrative spine.
